PAIN.quote: Im almost to the point where I think I'll never be able to get rid of my slice
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Terrified and Uncomfortable with Driver

PAIN.quote: It's the worst slice in the world because it'll jump off the clubface, start out perfectly straight and powerful, but as soon as the dimples catch the air it does an almost 90* turn to the right
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Terrified and Uncomfortable with Driver

PAIN.quote: It causes me to rarely use my driver and I am constantly playing from behind other players in my group
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Terrified and Uncomfortable with Driver

PAIN.quote: My crazy slice only happens with my driver, 3 and 5 woods. It's like I automatically psyche myself out when I have a tee shot and I am always having to play from the right side
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Terrified and Uncomfortable with Driver

PAIN.quote: I shoot mid to high 80's but if I could fix my drive I know I could shave 10 strokes
PAIN.source: TheSandTrap - Terrified and Uncomfortable with Driver

PAIN.quote: So as of recently I have had very little confidence in my driver and mentally I am prepared to hit a bad shot before I even step up to the ball
96 percent want to hit anything but a slice, and only 8 percent come to Golftec hitting a draw
PAIN.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

PAIN.quote: The slice, friends, is still golf's most confounding swing fault, or as Nick Clearwater, Golftec's vice president of instruction calls it, 'an epidemic'
PAIN.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

PAIN.quote: People keep swinging farther to the left hoping the ball will go the way they want it to. It doesn't work
PAIN.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

PAIN.quote: The driver slice might be the most discouraging shot in golf. Among other things, it leaves you with a longer second shot, and it deals a blow to your confidence
PAIN.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

PAIN.quote: I can't imagine paying $220 extra for 8 more yards but missing more fairways
PAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison Comments

PAIN.quote: It's $225 more!!!! it would not get that rating from me based on that price
PAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison Comments
PAIN.context: Price objection to premium draw driver

HOPE.quote: we put the new draw-bias drivers to the test and found they really do what they're designed to do
HOPE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

HOPE.quote: Seventy percent of the golfers hit the draw drivers more to the left (13.3 yards farther on average compared to their regular drivers). Interestingly, they also hit the draw drivers farther—5.7 yards on average
HOPE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver
HOPE.context: Quantified improvement - more left AND more distance

HOPE.quote: It's worth noting that these results were immediate—less than five swings for each player
HOPE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

HOPE.quote: It's really just a misunderstanding of how to make the ball curve... The good news is that it's a very fixable problem
HOPE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

HOPE.quote: It's joyous to watch when you put a draw-bias driver in someone's hands, and the ball is going farther and straighter. Honestly, I think it's the best-kept secret in golf
HOPE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver (Ping VP)
HOPE.context: Industry expert joy quote - best kept secret

HOPE.quote: I play the Ping G430 SFT with the stock CB R flex shaft and yes it is shorter than other drivers but wow is it a fairway finder
HOPE.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison Comments

HOPE.quote: I can confirm the Paradigm is the better choice... For me it came out to about a 30 yard difference
HOPE.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison Comments

HOPE.quote: The other big thing I noticed was a ball speed difference off the face of about 10 mph
HOPE.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison Comments
HOPE.context: Ball speed improvement with draw driver

HOPE.quote: It's the simplest fix for so many people
HOPE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver (Ping VP)

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: A slice is caused by the most common of swing flaws: swinging the club down steeply on an out-to-in path with an open face to that path at impact. This creates sidespin that sends the ball curving weakly to the right
ROOT_CAUSE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: A closed face driver never has and never will correct a slice. Its a marketing gimmic that people continue to buy into. The face simply starts the ball to the left
ROOT_CAUSE.source: GolfWRX - Closed face driver making slice worse

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: The problem people slice is because of modern instruction. The 'modern' cure for a slice is swing inside out. But slicers don't know how to release the club
ROOT_CAUSE.source: GolfWRX - I can't understand why people slice

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: When you move the CG to the heel, no matter where you hit it, it produces more draw
ROOT_CAUSE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver (TaylorMade CTO)

ROOT_CAUSE.quote: at least half the players could benefit from a draw driver
ROOT_CAUSE.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver (Ping VP)

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: I just had it shortened from 46" to 44.25" hoping for more control
SOLUTIONS_TRIED.source: TheSandTrap - Terrified and Uncomfortable with Driver

SOLUTIONS_TRIED.quote: I had 3 good drives and these happened when I just teed the ball up and whacked away - no practice swing no routine no time to think
Hit 3 wood. I had the exact same problem, I started hitting 3 wood off every tee box. Playing 'small ball' and broke 80 4 times this summer
I could not stop slicing my drives yet the videos showed me as textbook but the club was always open. Bottom line, I could not turn my hips as fast as I used to and square the clubface
A pro told me to stop rehearsing, thinking or having so many swing thoughts then he told me a trick of counting down 99 98 97... hit

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: The key to these new drivers is internal weighting that shifts the center of gravity (CG) toward the heel
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: With 41 grams of weight in the heel, this driver puts almost twice as much mass toward the draw side than the company's movable weight M3
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver (TaylorMade M4 D-Type)

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: Draw-bias designs also encourage a straighter ball flight by featuring higher lofts, lighter shafts and more upright lie angles
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: with the CG closer to the heel, draw drivers help average golfers return the face to square at impact because the CG is closer to the shaft
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: The Callaway Paradym Ai Smoke Max D was the best golf driver we tested for distance. This one led the entire test in the distance category, not just the draw drivers
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: PING G430 SFT outperformed... The accuracy scoring for PING was 8.4 versus 7.2 for Callaway
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: PING had a forgiveness score of 9.2, making it the third most-forgiving driver in the test
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: Carry distance for the PING G430 SFT was about eight yards shorter... The PING's distance ranking was 6.2, its lowest performance metric
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison

COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.quote: The Callaway Paradym Ai Smoke Max D is $599. The PING G430 SFT is $399
COMPETITOR_MECHANISM.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison

VILLAIN.quote: This player has the face open at impact, and everything we do with this club in terms of CG bias is helping to solve that problem
VILLAIN.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver (TaylorMade CTO)
VILLAIN.context: Big Golf admission - they're compensating for player flaw

VILLAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison Comments

VILLAIN.quote: You need to take all these tests with many grains of salt. I'll bet you if these tests were done a month later with other testers the results would differ
VILLAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison Comments

VILLAIN.quote: More yards or more fairways? Here's where you must make one of those difficult big-kid golf decisions
VILLAIN.source: MyGolfSpy - Callaway vs PING Draw Driver Comparison

VILLAIN.quote: adjustable drivers on the market that allow golfers to load the club's movable weights toward the heel, but those tend to be less effective than the fixed internal weighting on the newest draw drivers
VILLAIN.source: Golf Digest - Cure Your Slice with Draw Driver
